en: We are here at Pixar Animation Studios in Emeryville, California.
ko: 캘리포니아 에머리빌에 있는 픽사 애니메이션 스튜디오에 왔어.

en: We're about to go inside to meet Anna,
ko: 지금 안에 들어가서 안나를 만날 건데,

en: who is one of the character designers of Hoppers.
ko: 호퍼스의 캐릭터 디자이너 중 한 명이야.

en: How do you incorporate the personality of the voice actor
I could show you what I do by trying to draw you as a beaver,
ko: 제가 하는 걸 보여드릴게요, 비버로 그려볼게요,

en: if you want to see how that would look.
This is Michelle as a beaver.
Trying to get some details in there, the eyeliner, the hair, the jacket.
